rag_rules: Place input envelope assumptions in component type annexes when concrete bounds or visible relations are provided
Use visible feature names and constants in AGREE contracts for type scope assumptions
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be syntactically valid and use only visible identifiers from the AADL model
Assumptions and guarantees should be scoped to component types or implementations based on the visibility of referenced elements
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Boolean expressions in AGREE must match the actual data types of referenced variables
anti_patterns: Do not generate assumptions or guarantees that reference opaque Boolean data as numeric values
Do not include AADL property names like Compute_Execution_Time as AGREE variables
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
Implementation-level bindings and subcomponent port usage
